contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Outbound Review: All correspondence link + URL pinning on Gmail clicks
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/230
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/231
  
  Details:
  Outbound Review per-card Gmail links + URL pinning
  
  Two follow-on dapp PRs to close UX gaps in the warmup_review draft review flow,
  on top of the earlier deep-link work (PRs #228 / #229 / agentic_ai_context #118).
  
  Shipped:
  
  1. TrueSightDAO/dapp#230 — "All correspondence" link per draft card.
     Opens Gmail's #search/{to_email} so the reviewer can see every prior thread
     with that recipient in one click. Useful for sanity-checking draft framing
     against earlier correspondence without leaving the review flow.
  
  2. TrueSightDAO/dapp#231 — clicks on "Edit in Gmail" and "All correspondence"
     now pin the card's gmail_draft_id in the URL hash (#tab/d-{id}), same
     effect as opening a <details> panel. Closes the gap where a reviewer
     jumping to Gmail before expanding anything couldn't grab a draft-specific
     URL to hand to an LLM CLI.
  
  Net: the browser URL bar is now always an accurate pointer to the draft Gary
  is focused on, regardless of whether he interacted via expand-body or via the
  Gmail jump-out links.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
